recommendations.title: Jackass Forever
recommendations.overview: The Jackass crew, along with some newcomers, returns for one final round of hilarious, absurd, and dangerous stunts.

recommendations.title: The Dirt
recommendations.overview: The story of Mötley Crüe and their rise from the Sunset Strip club scene of the early 1980s to superstardom.

recommendations.title: Jackass Number Two
recommendations.overview: Jackass Number Two is a compilation of various stunts, pranks and skits, and essentially has no plot. Chris Pontius, Johnny Knoxville, Steve-O, Bam Margera, and the whole crew return to the screen to raise the stakes higher than ever before.

recommendations.title: Jackass: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Johnny Knoxville and his band of maniacs perform a variety of stunts and gross-out gags on the big screen for the first time. They wander around Japan in panda outfits, wreak havoc on a once civilized golf course, they even do stunts involving LIVE a

recommendations.title: Jackass 3.5
recommendations.overview: Johnny Knoxville of 'Jackass' releases unused material of stunts, tricks, antics and shenanigans shot during the production of 'Jackass 3D' that didn't make it into the film, as well as the hilarious outtakes.

recommendations.title: Jackass 3D
recommendations.overview: Johnny Knoxville, Bam Margera, Steve-O, Wee Man and the rest of their fearless and foolhardy friends take part in another round of outrageous pranks and stunts. In addition to standing in the path of a charging bull, launching themselves into the air

recommendations.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa
recommendations.overview: 86-year-old Irving Zisman is on a journey across America with the most unlikely companion: his 8 year-old grandson, Billy.

recommendations.title: Nitro Circus: The Movie
recommendations.overview: You will see Travis Pastrana and the whole Nitro Circus crew perform some of the most ridiculous, awe-inspiring, and simply insane stunts ever caught on camera. Coming to you in three dimensional glory, it will feel like you are there sitting shotgun

recommendations.title: Jackass 2.5
recommendations.overview: The crew have now set off to finish what as left over from Jackass 2.0, and in this version they have Wee Man use a 'pee' gun on themselves, having a mini motor bike fracas in the grocery mall, a sperm test, a portly crew member disguised as King Kon

recommendations.title: They Shall Not Grow Old
recommendations.overview: A documentary about World War I with never-before-seen footage to commemorate the centennial of Armistice Day, and the end of the war.
